use_cases: Display loading state while fetching data from API
Show progress indication during async operations
Indicate file upload or processing in progress
Provide visual feedback during form submission
Indicate background task running in dashboards
ai_summary: WaveLoader is a minimalist loading spinner component featuring animated vertical bars that pulse in a sequential wave pattern using motion/react. Configurable bar count and message placement make it versatile for various loading contexts across SaaS dashboards, e-commerce carts, and data-heavy applications.
